text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
From the inside comes Special Week! Special Week makes her move!
With a lead of three to four lengths... she crosses the goal!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
In her first stab at a graded race, she takes the Kisaragi Sho with
ease!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
"Special Week bounces back with a splendid victory! With the
Classics in her sights, she makes her way to the Yayoi Sho."

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Ehehe... There's something a little embarrassing about seeing yourself
in a magazine.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Spe, you must hold your head high! Your fans want to see a proud,
strong racer for them to cheer on!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Gotta say, with all these eyes on you, it feels like I know a celebrity.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
But what about you? You haven't even lost once yet. Everyone's
saying you're going to be a major player in the Classics this year.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: C'mooon, I just got lucky.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: I'm glad to hear you're all doing so well.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Ooohohoho! Speaking of major players, I'd say I make that list too,
wouldn't you?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Yeah, King! You were sooo close to winning that last race!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
O-ohohoho! Rising from the ashes of defeat undaunted is the mark of
a true first-rate Umamusume!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Anyway, is what the article said true? Your next race is the Yayoi
Sho?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Yup, sure is. Why?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
What a coincidence. I look forward to seeing your skills with my own
eyes.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: For I am also running in the Yayoi Sho.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Hold on, isn't your next race also the Yayoi Sho, Sei?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Yup. Feel free to go easy on me, guys.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Huh? Wait...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Whaaaaat?!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Seiun Sky flies ahead! Her lead just keeps growing and growing... and
she crosses the goal!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In her next race, Special Week will finally be squaring up with the
major players in her generation.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But the impending showdown hasn't dampened her drive to win. In
response, I've been busy gathering as much information as I can.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Staying late for research again, are we?

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text:
Yeah. The Classics are already a challenge, and Spe's going to be up
against the Golden Generation on top of that.

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text:
But she's got a dream, and she's determined to make it happen. So I'll
spare no effort to help her.

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text:
But she's got a dream, and she's determined to make it happen. So I'll
spare no effort to help her.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: You really haven't changed a bit.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
You are the pillar that raises us up to reach our goals. That was the
case at the Tenno Sho all that time ago, and it's still the case now.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Mejiro McQueen's expression beams with pride and gratitude.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her dream to conquer the Tenno Sho wasn't her dream alone—as a
new trainer, it also meant a lot to me.

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text:
It's hard to believe our team was on the verge of disbanding at one
point.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: It is, isn't it?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
In any case, you've got quite the dream on your hands this time. I'm
not even sure how one becomes the best racer in Japan.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: She says that, but her eyes glint with anticipation.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I can tell she believes in her teammate and can't wait to see how
Special Week pulls it off.
choice_data_list: It may be tough, but we'll make it happen.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: And know that your team will be behind you the entire way.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Let's see, what else... "I'll be taking on the Yayoi Sho next, my first
step towards being the best in Japan."

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Is that a letter to your mother?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Yup. I know I could just call her, but isn't it... kind of embarrassing to
say certain things out loud?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
So I'm telling her through a letter instead. After all, I still want her to
know I'm working hard to be the best in Japan!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Hehe.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Huh? Did I... say something funny?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
No, not at all. I just think it's cute that you're so considerate of your
mother.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Ehehe... Well yeah, I'm super grateful for my moms! Both of them
gave me lots and lots of love, making me who I am today!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: What do you mean, both of them?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Well, you see, I actually have two mothers. My mama, who gave birth
to me, and my mom who raised me.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
And they're the ones who gave me my dream. The dream to be the
best racer in Japan.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Originally, that dream belonged to my birth mother.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
But... for a variety of reasons, she never got to set foot on the turf. So
her dream went unfulfilled.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
So when she was pregnant with me, she used to say I would grow up
to be the best racer in Japan in her place. She was just joking, of
course.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
But I bet she was really looking forward to seeing me chase that
dream with her... Unfortunately though, she died shortly after I was
born.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Oh, I'm so sorry...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Ah! I didn't mean to darken the mood! In fact, I just wanted to brag to
you about how amazing my mama was!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
But after she passed away, her close friend took me in and raised me.
That's my mom.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
According to her, it wasn't easy though. Evidently I'd run off the
second she took her eyes off me...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Hehe.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Once I was a little older, she told me about Mama and the dream she
left behind.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
...Even now, Mom still occasionally asks me if I really want to become
the best racer in Japan. I think she's worried I'm doing this for Mama
instead of myself.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: But that's not true. You chose this path for yourself.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Right! I want to be the best racer in Japan and make both of my moms proud!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
And I can't break the promise I made you when I won my debut race!
You know, that I'd make my dream come true!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: So just you watch! I'll win the Yayoi Sho for both our promise and my moms!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Hehe, I can hardly wait.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Ehehe... Good!
